import json, re, os, textwrap, unicodedata, math, statistics, itertools
from difflib import SequenceMatcher

# Load the provided files
quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-FMu3bAgEAQtmEQQC8jx6tp-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-Q1ZkZ7hNQqPEcQ1vsVE9Pf-six_hadith_books.json"

def load_json(path):
    with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        return json.load(f)

quran = load_json(quran_path)
hadith = load_json(hadith_path)

len(quran), len(hadith)[:2] if isinstance(hadith, list) else type(hadith)
type(quran), (quran[0] if isinstance(quran, list) else list(quran.keys())[:5])
type(hadith), (hadith[0].keys() if isinstance(hadith, list) else list(hadith.keys())[:10])

import re
AR_DIACRITICS = re.compile(r"[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]")
TATWEEL = "\u0640"

def normalize_arabic(s):
    if s is None:
        return ""
    s = s.replace(TATWEEL, "")
    s = AR_DIACRITICS.sub("", s)
    # Normalize hamza forms to base letters
    s = re.sub("[إأٱآا]", "ا", s)
    s = re.sub("[ى]", "ي", s)
    s = re.sub("[ؤ]", "و", s)
    s = re.sub("[ئ]", "ي", s)
    # Remove punctuation and non-letters digits
    s = re.sub(r"[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]+", " ", s)
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip()
    return s

def sim_ratio(a, b):
    return SequenceMatcher(None, a, b).ratio()

span_full = "وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ وِلْدَانٌ قَاعِدَةٌ حَفِيٌّ بِزِينَةٍ مِنْ كُلِّ زِينَةٍ وَخُذُوا مِنْ أَمْوَالِهِنَّ بِالْمَعْرُوفِ تُؤْتِيَنَّهُنَّ رِزْقًا طَيِّبًا وَكُلُوا مِنْهُنَّ طَيِّبًا وَءَاتُوهُنَّ كِرَامًا وَبِصَبرٍ وَقُولُوا لِلْمُؤْمِنَاتِ يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ قُلْ لِأَزْوَاجِكَ وَبَنَاتِكَ وَنِسَاءِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ يُدْنِدْنَ مِنْ أَنْفُسِهِنَّ شَيْئًا ذَلِكَ أَدْنَى أَلَزِمُهُنَّ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَمُتَعَلِّمَاتٍ"
norm_span = normalize_arabic(span_full)
norm_span[:200], len(norm_span)

query = "يا ايها النبي قل لازواجك وبناتك ونساء المؤمنين"
matches = []
for v in quran:
    t = normalize_arabic(v["ayah_text"])
    if query in t:
        matches.append(v)
len(matches), [(m["surah_id"], m["ayah_id"], m["ayah_text"][:70]) for m in matches[:5]]
